title: sedum fragrans
intro: Sedum fragrans, also known as the fragrant sedum, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of sedum fragrans include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant's leaves and stems can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce anxiety.
